titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to New Blue, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 08:36

did.abstract: The records consist of tour records, performance events, scrapbooks, photographs and musical recordings from New Blue, the first women's a cappella group at Yale University.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies, and organizations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records requires permission from the archivist of New Blue.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: New Blue, Yale University, Records (RU 1160). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The New Blue a cappella group was founded in 1969 and is the first women's singing group at Yale University. Since its inception, New Blue has produced multiple recording albums and has toured extensively throughout the United States and around the world.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of tour records, performance events, scrapbooks, photographs and musical recordings from New Blue, the first women's a cappella group at Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged by accession.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to this collection requires the permission of the archivist of New Blue.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: Central Intelligence Agency Certificate of Appreciation

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: The New Blue Comes to Pine Crest Boca
The New Blue Old, New Borrowed, Blue: 10th Anniversary Album
